name: Peanut Polka Dot Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Vanilla-flavored candy coating (cut into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter a 13 x 9-inch pan.
2. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt the candy coating and peanut butter; blend well.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in the cereal and peanuts; mix well.
4. Press mixture evenly into the buttered pan.
5. Immediately sprinkle M&M's over the bars; press lightly.
6. Allow to set for 45 to 60 minutes.
7. Cut into bars.
8. Store in a tightly covered container.
9. Makes 48 bars.
